name: agnosis/agnosis-dev
description: Dev tooling for the Agnosis WordPress plugin. The plugin source lives in the parent ../ directory. Runtime deps (webklex/php-imap and its transitive tree) are no longer required here directly (C-item/§4e) — includes/ now references the prefixed Agnosis\Vendor\Webklex\PHPIMAP\* namespace, resolved for tests via ../vendor-prefixed/autoload.php (see bootstrap.php). The distributable vendor/ + vendor-prefixed/ are built from the plugin root composer.json by build-zip.sh.

test: WP_TESTS_DIR='' WP_PHPUNIT__DIR='' php -d pcov.enabled=1 -d pcov.directory=.. vendor/bin/phpunit --colors=always
test:unit: WP_TESTS_DIR='' WP_PHPUNIT__DIR='' php -d pcov.enabled=1 -d pcov.directory=.. vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite=unit --colors=always
test:integration: ./node_modules/.bin/wp-env run tests-cli bash -c 'wp plugin activate lingua-forge agnosis --quiet'

./node_modules/.bin/wp-env run tests-wordpress bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/agnosis/dev && WP_PHPUNIT__DIR=/wordpress-phpunit php -d memory_limit=512M vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.integration.xml.dist --no-coverage --colors=always'
coverage:run: WP_TESTS_DIR='' WP_PHPUNIT__DIR='' php -d pcov.enabled=1 -d pcov.directory=.. vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite=unit --coverage-clover coverage/unit/clover.xml --coverage-html coverage/unit/html --coverage-text=coverage/unit/coverage.txt
./node_modules/.bin/wp-env run tests-cli bash -c 'wp plugin activate lingua-forge agnosis --quiet'

./node_modules/.bin/wp-env run tests-wordpress bash -c 'mkdir -p /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/agnosis/dev/coverage/integration/html && cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/agnosis/dev && WP_PHPUNIT__DIR=/wordpress-phpunit php -d memory_limit=512M -d pcov.enabled=1 -d pcov.directory=/var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/agnosis vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.integration.xml.dist --coverage-clover coverage/integration/clover.xml --coverage-html coverage/integration/html --coverage-text=coverage/integration/coverage.txt'

scripts-descriptions.lint: Run PHPCS against ../ using WordPress Coding Standards.
scripts-descriptions.lint:fix: Auto-fix the subset of PHPCS issues phpcbf can fix.
scripts-descriptions.cs:fix: Alias for lint:fix — auto-fix code style with phpcbf.
scripts-descriptions.analyse: Run PHPStan with the WordPress stub set against ../.
scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full PHPUnit suite (unit + integration).
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run only the unit suite (no WordPress required).
scripts-descriptions.test:integration: Run the integration suite inside wp-env (requires npm run env:start).
scripts-descriptions.coverage:setup: Install pcov in the wp-env tests-wordpress container. Run once after npm run env:start.
scripts-descriptions.coverage:run: Run unit + integration suites with Clover coverage output. Requires wp-env running + pcov installed.
scripts-descriptions.coverage:merge: Merge unit and integration Clover XMLs into coverage/combined/. Run after coverage:run.
scripts-descriptions.coverage: Full coverage pipeline: coverage:run → coverage:merge. Reports land in coverage/unit/, coverage/integration/, coverage/combined/.
scripts-descriptions.make-pot: Extract source strings and merge into .po files.
scripts-descriptions.make-theme-pot: Same as make-pot, scoped to the sibling agnosis-theme repo's own languages/agnosis-theme.pot + .po files.
scripts-descriptions.compile-pos: Compile .po files into .mo binaries and .l10n.php caches.
scripts-descriptions.compile-theme-pos: Same as compile-pos, scoped to the sibling agnosis-theme repo's own languages/agnosis-theme-*.po files.
scripts-descriptions.fill-loco-gaps: On-demand (not per-version): scan for plural entries Loco Translate left partially translated (AUDIT-0.9.44.md §5d) and print a JSON report; pass -- --apply=FILE.json to write provided translations into empty slots only.
scripts-descriptions.translate-missing: On-demand (not per-version): AI-translate every empty string across all 18 locales in one pass, replacing the manual Loco Translate workflow. Anthropic (default, Haiku), OpenAI, or Gemini via --provider=anthropic|openai|gemini. Needs that provider's API key — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY or leave it unset to be prompted (hidden input, used for that run only). Writes directly to .po; see dev/translate-missing.log. Flags: --dry-run, --locale=xx, --limit=N, --batch-size=N, --provider=NAME, --model=NAME.
scripts-descriptions.translate-theme-missing: Same as translate-missing, scoped to the sibling agnosis-theme repo's own languages/agnosis-theme-*.po files. Same flags, same API-key handling, see dev/translate-theme-missing.log.
scripts-descriptions.build-zip: Package the plugin into a distributable zip via rsync + .distignore (includes uncommitted changes).
scripts-descriptions.build-theme-zip: Package the Agnosis Theme into a distributable zip, output to agnosis-deploy/.
scripts-descriptions.qa: Local pre-deploy gate: lint → analyse → unit tests → js/css lint.
